name: Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Canvas Jar Candle Blue/White 6oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Decorate your home while spreading a fresh, citrusy aroma with the Speckle-Faceted Ceramic Canvas Jar Candle from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This white jar candle features a speckled, faceted design with blue on the inside for a beautiful look, and the mix of lemon, sage and floral scents provides a delightful ambiance. Made of ceramic and filled with palm and paraffin wax, this faceted jar candle burns for about 20 hours.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
